reason: Successfully navigated to the agent, sent a math question, and verified the response contains "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing Gamut application with sidebar containing two agents
Found and clicked the "QA-20260706-172635-b396" agent in sidebar (ref=e55) — Successfully navigated to the agent's page with status "idle"
Verified agent status — Status is "idle" (visible in the interface status indicator)
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" into the message input field — Message was successfully entered into the textbox (ref=e172)
Clicked the Send button (ref=e309) — Message was sent and a new chat session "Simple Math Question Session" was created
Waited up to 3 minutes for a response — Agent responded with "4" in approximately 1 second

Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Screenshot shows the agent's response of "4" clearly displayed in the chat conversation with "Worked for 1s" indicator. Response text extracted: ["Hello! What is 2+2?", "4"]
